title: Privacy Policy
lead: This is placeholder text and must be replaced with legal-approved content before production launch.

blocks.heading: Scope
blocks.body: How AION Engenharia handles personal data on this informational website in line with applicable laws.

blocks.heading: Privacy contact
blocks.body: For requests regarding your personal data or this policy, use the official contact channels shown in the site footer.

blocks.heading: Cookies and analytics (when enabled)
blocks.body: If enabled, we may use Plausible Analytics (privacy-first, no advertising cookies). A consent banner is shown in that case; if analytics is not configured, no third-party measurement script is loaded.
